creator: toaster@chef-ingenieur.de
text:
Supermicro Mainboard X7SBE with IMPI-Card AOC-SIM1U+: Remote Console is
not working, wenn FreeBSD is running. It's working well in the Mainboard
BIOS and FreeBSD Bootloader. The content of the console is displayed, but
the remote Keyboard is not working (no input possible). Maybe a problem
with the keyboard driver.

With FreeBSD-7.0-REL amd64 it works as expected.

How-To-Repeat: You will need the above-mentioned hardware.
